/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,librover_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so -o librover_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/rover_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/rover_msgs/msg/_rover_info_s.c.o CMakeFiles/rover_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/rover_msgs/msg/_emergency_stop_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/giorgio/Webots/build/rover_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so librover_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so librover_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
